title: Weave Robotics launches Isaac 1, a $7,999 home robot with Fall 2026 deliveries
summary: Weave Robotics 发布了售价 7999 美元的 Isaac 1 家用机器人，预计 2026 年秋季交付。
translated_summary: Weave Robotics launches Isaac 1, a $7,999 home robot with Fall 2026 deliveries, marking a significant step in consumer robotics.
